text: The weather is beautiful today

key_phrases.note: 描述天气好的常用搭配

cultural_note: 英语母语者常用天气话题作为寒暄开场白，这被称为 'weather talk' 文化。

text: I would like a cup of coffee please

key_phrases.note: 比 'I want' 更礼貌，常用于点餐或请求
量词搭配：a cup of + 饮品

cultural_note: 'I would like' 是英语中最常用的礼貌请求句式，缩写形式 'I'd like' 在口语中更常见。

text: How are you doing this morning

key_phrases.note: 比 'How are you' 更口语化、更亲切
this + 时间段 表示'这个...'

cultural_note: 美式英语中 'How are you doing' 是最常见的问候之一，回答通常用 'I'm doing good/great' 或简单 'Good, you?'

text: Can you help me find my way

key_phrases.note: way在此处指'路/方向'，常用搭配 find one's way

text: The children are playing in the garden
translation: 孩子们正在花园里玩耍

text: I enjoy reading books in the evening
The restaurant serves delicious food
translation: 这家餐厅供应美味的食物

text: We went to the park yesterday
Learning English takes time and practice
translation: 学习英语需要时间和练习
